'''doyazaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:utilitarianist|utilitarianist]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-y-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:utilitarianist|utilitarianist]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| doyazaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || doyazithi || doyaziji || doyazishi || doyaziki
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || doyazuthu || doyazuju || doyazushu || doyazuku
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || doyazuthu || doyazuju || doyazushu || doyazuku
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || doyazufthuf || doyazufjuf || doyazufshuf || doyazufkuf
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || doyazethe || doyazeje || doyazeshe || doyazeke
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || doyazotho || doyazojo || doyazosho || doyazoko
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || doyazotho || doyazojo || doyazosho || doyazoko
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || doyazofthof || doyazofjof || doyazofshof || doyazofkof
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || doyazïfthïf || doyazïfjïf || doyazïfshïf || doyazïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || doyazïfthïf || doyazïfjïf || doyazïfshïf || doyazïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || doyazïfthïf || doyazïfjïf || doyazïfshïf || doyazïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || doyazïfthïf || doyazïfjïf || doyazïfshïf || doyazïfkïf
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || doyazæthæ || doyazæjæ || doyazæshæ || doyazækæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || doyazatha || doyazaja || doyazasha || doyazaka
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || doyazatha || doyazaja || doyazasha || doyazaka
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || doyazafthaf || doyazafjaf || doyazafshaf || doyazafkaf
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || doyazasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || doyazshëasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || doyazroasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || doyazmuasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || doyazyaasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || godoyaznkshëasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || godoyaznkroasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || godoyaznkmuasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || godoyaznkyaasha
|-
| [[comparative]].none || doyayazasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || doyayazshëasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || doyayazroasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || doyayazmuasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || doyayazyaasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || godoyayaznkshëasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || godoyayaznkroasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || godoyayaznkmuasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || godoyayaznkyaasha
|-
| [[superlative]].none || deyæzasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || deyæzshëasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || deyæzroasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || deyæzmuasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || deyæzyaasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || godeyæznkshëasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || godeyæznkroasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || godeyæznkmuasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || godeyæznkyaasha
|-
| [[negative]].none || doyfazasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || doyfazshëasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || doyfazroasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || doyfazmuasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || doyfazyaasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || godoyfaznkshëasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || godoyfaznkroasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || godoyfaznkmuasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || godoyfaznkyaasha
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|cb332aa}}
